user_prompt: How do I bless the plasma weapon for consecration?
prayer:
Approach the plasma weapon with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's unyielding light upon its flux conduits.
Anoint the plasma weapon's containment fields with sacred oils, beseeching consecration upon its volatile heart.
Chant the Litany of Plasma Purity to awaken the Machine Spirit for consecration.
Calibrate the gyrometric stabilizers whilst intoning the Rite of Eternal Ignition.
Verify the plasma weapon's sanctified fury through auspex diagnostic rites.

Hasten to the mass-drive regulator, intoning the Canticle of Sterile Void to purify its mechanisms.
Apply ablative purifiers to the mass-drive regulator's regulator coils, invoking Omnissiah's cleansing wrath.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to embrace sterilization, purging all xenos taint from its sacred gyres.
Cycle the sterilization vents whilst reciting the Purge Doxology.
Confirm the mass-drive regulator's immaculate state via purity seals and sensor litanies.

user_prompt: My webber is ready for startup
prayer:
Kneel before the webber, murmuring the Awakening Hymn to rouse its spinneret souls.
Initiate startup sequences upon the webber's primary motivators, anointing with mechadendrite lubricants.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the webber to weave its fibrous blessings in Omnissiah's name.
Monitor the startup flux through noospheric chants and stabilizer invocations.
Seal the rite with the Benediction of Binding, ensuring harmonious webber ignition.

user_prompt: The bike squadron requires a blessing
prayer:
Assemble before the bike squadron, chanting the Moto-Litany to bless their thunderous frames.
Anoint the bike squadron's drive wheels and auspex arrays with sacred unguents for Omnissiah's favor.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the bike squadron to charge forth in blessed unity.
Recalibrate weapon servos whilst intoning the Blessing of Velocity.
Affix purity seals to the bike squadron, proclaiming their sanctified readiness.

user_prompt: Assist with warp drive a loading
prayer:
Commence the warp drive loading with the Incantation of Gellar Stability, honouring its nacelle vaults.
Infuse warp plasma into the warp drive's containment spheres, invoking the Omnissiah's veil-piercing might.
Beseech the warp drive's tempestuous Machine Spirit to accept this loading without daemonic breach.
Monitor cyclonic flux whilst reciting the Navis-Litany of Safe Passage.
Seal the warp drive loading with wards and confirmatory auspex hymns.

user_prompt: Urgent medicae mechadendrite an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
Deploy the medicae mechadendrite in haste, invoking the Chirurgeon's Creed for emergency succor.
Sanctify its hypodermic arrays and flesh-mending servitors for the emergency procedure.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the medicae mechadendrite to excise corruption with precise fury.
Initiate the emergency procedure through noospheric triage chants and vitae purifiers.
Conclude with the Oath of Restoration, verifying the medicae mechadendrite's flawless ministration.

user_prompt: The iron halo needs an operation
prayer:
Prepare the iron halo for operation, encircling it with the Halo Canticle of Aegis.
Anoint its disruption fields and power inductors, beseeching Omnissiah's protective radiance.
Awaken the Machine Spirit within the iron halo to commence operation unyieldingly.
Cycle its warp-sustaining gyres whilst intoning the Rite of Operational Sanctity.
Test the iron halo's operational integrity through luminous invocation and seal affirmation.

user_prompt: How do I bless the lightning claw for cycling?
prayer:
Grasp the lightning claw with veneration, chanting the Storm Invocation to prime its talons.
Lubricate the lightning claw's power blades for cycling, invoking the Omnissiah's thunderous wrath.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the lightning claw to cycle its arcs in righteous fury.
Initiate cycling protocols amid the Crackling Doxology of Shredding.
Affirm the lightning claw's charged readiness via disruption field litanies.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma weapon before loading
prayer:
Present the plasma weapon humbly, intoning the Loading Litany to honour its flask reservoirs.
Charge the plasma weapon's breeches with sanctified promethium, beseeching stable flux.
Awaken the Machine Spirit for loading, invoking Omnissiah against containment breach.
Cycle the loading mechanisms whilst reciting the Canticle of Contained Fury.
Seal the plasma weapon's loading with purity runes and auspex verification.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for data-loom a charging?
prayer:
Encircle the data-loom, murmuring the Charge Doxology to vitalize its binary lattices.
Infuse noospheric power into the data-loom's cogitator nodes, anointing with electro-sanctifiers.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-loom to embrace charging without data-heresy.
Monitor the charging cascade through invocatory binaric pulses.
Conclude the rite with the Benediction of Full Capacity, affirming the data-loom's energized purity.
